{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = 354th sacrifice
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cynara]] was the first offering in the [[354th sacrifice]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
